title: [coap] Define and use RFC7252 constants instead of magic numbers
description: In rust/lichen-coap/src/client.rs, codec.rs and related: replace hardcoded CoAP codes (0x45 for 2.05), header bytes (0x60), CONTENT_FORMAT_CBOR=60 with proper consts from spec/07-transport-app.md and RFC 7252. Add to lichen-coap crate. Reference project-LICHEN-f4xg.
